race.comment: The blue bred (I Am Invincible x Arcadia Queen) FEDERALIST (4) resumes as a gelding. He's yet to place in six runs but has put up some performances in top company that win this, just doing plenty wrong as a colt. Outside of his unlucky debut, this is the only time he's been in maiden company and despite the wide gate he can prove too good. STANDARD DEVIATION (1) resumes, making his local debut for Chris Waller. He showed ability in three runs in Ireland and should be respected, especially if firm in bettong. WRITTEN STORY (10) resumes. She showed ability last time in and can run well fresh. STUNTMAN (5) was good in a handy maiden on debut and can improve.
